title: Weekend Escape in Brno
description: First trip in Chechia outside of Prague, it is a charming surprise. The city has a relaxed vibe, with a mix of architectural styles and a lively café culture. It's the perfect place for a weekend escape.
coverAlt: Neo-Gothic building facade along a cobblestone street with tram lines in Brno's old town

images.alt: Ornate Neo-Gothic building facade on a sunlit street with tram tracks and pedestrians in Brno
images.caption: Afternoon light on the old town.

images.alt: Underground cistern with rows of concrete columns lit by warm floor lights
images.caption: Beneath the city: Brno's underground water tanks, cathedral-like in its stillness.
